## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Augment Code and Growth X teams to discuss progress, updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Oggy CLI launch pending; Growth X team ready, waiting on Augment Code's development](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

## Topics

### Oggy CLI Progress

  - [Malaysia reviewing workflows; first batch of 70-80 ready](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### SEO Content Strategy

  - [SEO performance plateaued recently; focus on improving existing content](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Plan to pause new content creation for a week to:](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Consolidate overlapping articles (e.g., 5 articles into 1-2)](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Upgrade workflows for better content quality](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Optimize keyword usage (e.g., "AI Coding Tool" vs. "AI Coding Assistant")](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Content appearing in \~25% of tracked prompts, up from almost none initially](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [SEO still driving majority of clicks despite prompt appearances](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
